hero_sub: Haircuts, colour, facials, waxing and nail treatments

services.title: Classic Facial
services.body: Deep cleanse, exfoliate, tone, and hydrate skin with a tailored mask and massage

services.title: Manicure & Pedicure
services.body: Trim, shape, and polish nails; cuticle care; hand and foot massage included

services.title: Eyelash Extension
services.body: Apply individual synthetic lashes to each natural lash for length, curl, and volume

proof_quote: Always feel welcomed and leave feeling refreshed after each appointment
about: The Beauty Lounge Tettenhall is a beauty salon located in Wolverhampton. Clients can book appointments via email at info@thebeautyloungetettenhall.co.uk

faq.q: What area does The Beauty Lounge Tettenhall serve?
faq.a: The salon serves clients in Tettenhall and the wider Wolverhampton area

faq.q: How can I book an appointment?
faq.a: Send your booking request to info@thebeautyloungetettenhall.co.uk

faq.q: What should I expect during my visit?
faq.a: You will have a consultation to discuss your beauty needs, followed by the agreed treatment
